meta.title: Nostr Widgets
meta.description: Embed a Nostr profile, follow button, or recent feed into any website with one line of HTML. Server-rendered SVG, no JavaScript, no iframes, no tracking.

hero.title: Nostr Widgets
hero.subtitle: Drop a Nostr profile card, follow button, or live feed into any blog, README, or landing page with one line of HTML.

noJs.title: No JavaScript
noJs.description: Just an '' of a server-rendered SVG. Safe to embed anywhere — no third-party script on your page.

noIframe.title: No iframes
noIframe.description: Real '<a>' anchors point at nostr-wot.com so crawlers attribute the link properly. Iframes hide the destination — we don't use them.

noTracking.title: No tracking
noTracking.description: Static SVG only. No tracking pixel, no analytics, no fingerprinting. We don't see who embeds what.

kinds.title: Three widget kinds
kinds.subtitle: Each one is an SVG behind an anchor. Pick a kind, paste the snippet, you're done.

profile.name: Profile badge
profile.description: Self-contained card with avatar, display name, NIP-05, bio, and a Follow on Nostr CTA. Use it in author bios, sidebars, or "find me on Nostr" sections.

follow.name: Follow button
follow.description: Pill-shaped button that links straight to the user's profile on nostr-wot.com. Drop it next to your other social buttons.

feed.name: Feed strip
feed.description: The author's last 1–5 short notes, rendered as a vertical list. Embed it where you'd put a "latest posts" widget.

snippet.title: One line of HTML
snippet.description: Replace the npub with the one you want to feature. The snippet works in static-site generators, Notion, Substack, GitHub READMEs, and any markdown editor that accepts an image.

openSource.title: Open source
openSource.description: The renderer and the server are both MIT-licensed. Self-host the service if you'd rather not depend on nostr-wot.com, or contribute a new widget kind via PR.

cta.title: Ready to embed?
cta.subtitle: Read the launch post for the full story, or jump straight into the repo.
